college_name: KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology
about: KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology (KPRIET), established in 2006, is an autonomous engineering college affiliated to Anna University, located in Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu. Spread across 165 acres of lush green campus, KPRIET is accredited by NAAC with 'A' grade and holds NBA accreditation for multiple programmes. It consistently ranks among the top private engineering colleges in Tamil Nadu, with a strong industry-academia interface, active placement cell, and over 412 experienced faculty members across 12 departments.
summary: KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology (KPRIET), established in 2006, is an autonomous engineering college affiliated to Anna University, located
global_ranking: NIRF Rank: N/A | QS World: N/A | THE: N/A
ug_programs: B.Tech Artificial Intelligence and Data Science
B.Tech Computer Science and Business Systems
scholarships: KPR Merit Scholarship (up to 100% tuition for rank holders)
Government of Tamil Nadu SC/ST Fee Concession

about: IIT Kanpur (IITK) was established in 1959 and was the first institution in India to offer an education in computer science and engineering in 1963. Set on a sprawling 1055-acre campus in Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, IITK is renowned for pioneering research in space science, cyber security, and clean energy. It maintains active collaborations with MIT, Caltech, and leading global institutions.

about: IIT Delhi was established in 1961 and granted the status of an 'Institute of National Importance' by an Act of Parliament in 1963. Situated in New Delhi on a 325-acre campus, it has 13 departments and 4 interdisciplinary centres. IITD is ranked #197 by QS World University Rankings 2025 and is known for its vibrant research ecosystem, robust international collaborations, and exceptional placement records.

about: IIT Madras, established in 1959 with assistance from the West German government, is consistently ranked as India's top engineering institution. Located in a 617-acre campus within a forest reserve in Chennai, it houses over 550 faculty, 8,000+ students, and research centres of global repute. It has been ranked #1 in NIRF (Engineering) every year since 2018 and features in the QS World Rankings 201-300.
